sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_funnel (dt DateTime, id Int32, event String) ENGINE = MergeTree() PARTITION BY toYYYYMMDD(dt) ORDER BY id;
SELECT id, sequenceNextNode('forward', 'head')(dt, event, event = 'start', event = 'middle', event = 'end') AS next_event FROM test_funnel GROUP BY id, event;
SELECT id, sequenceNextNode('backward', 'tail')(dt, event, event = 'end', event = 'middle', event = 'start') AS previous_event FROM test_funnel GROUP BY id ORDER BY id;
CREATE TABLE test_funnel_edgecase (dt DateTime, id Int32, event Nullable(String)) ENGINE = MergeTree() PARTITION BY toYYYYMMDD(dt) ORDER BY id;

INSERT INTO test_funnel_edgecase VALUES (toDateTime('2023-01-01 00:00:01'), 1, 'start'), (toDateTime('2023-01-01 00:00:02'), 1, NULL), (toDateTime('2023-01-01 00:00:03'), 1, 'end'), (toDateTime('2023-01-01 00:00:01'), 2, NULL), (toDateTime('2023-01-01 00:00:03'), 2, 'middle');
SELECT id, sequenceNextNode('forward', 'first_match')(dt, event, event IS NULL, event = 'start') AS next_event FROM test_funnel_edgecase GROUP BY id;
CREATE TABLE test_funnel_complex (dt DateTime, id Int32, event String, ref String) ENGINE = MergeTree() PARTITION BY toYYYYMMDD(dt) ORDER BY id;
SELECT id, MAX(sequenceNextNode('backward', 'last_match')(dt, event, ref = 'ref1', event = 'B')) AS last_event FROM test_funnel_complex GROUP BY id HAVING last_event IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id, sequenceNextNode('forward', 'first_match')(dt, event, event = 'B', event = 'A', event IS NULL) AS next_event FROM test_funnel GROUP BY id;
